title: felicia abyssinica var. schimperi
intro: Felicia abyssinica var. schimperi, also known as Blue Felicia or Felicia Blue, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Felicia abyssinica var. schimperi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
